meta.title: Recent Cyber Attacks & How To Stop Them
meta.description: Joel Langill and Mariam Coladonato team up for this S4x22 Stage 3 presentation. They look at recent attacks and why they are still succeeding. They then go into zones and conduits with emphasis on micro segmentation ... not having one big OT zone.
